provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Rules may be cited as the Acquisition of Property (Board of Assessment) Rules.

provisions.title: Form of notice
provisions.content:
2. Form of notice
The form of notice requiring either the attendance of any person as a witness before a Board of Assessment or to produce any document before the said Board, or to do both shall be in the form set out in the Schedule hereto.
